data.body: SCOPE UPDATE (adversarial review F2+F3): Additional hook files with v2 references added to scope: compute-diff-hash.sh (remove v2 path exclusion from diff hash computation), review-stop-check.sh (remove v2 grep exclusions), record-review.sh (remove v2 diff exclusion patterns), title-length-validator.sh (remove v2 path guard), cascade-circuit-breaker.sh (remove v2 pattern match), check-validation-failures.sh (remove v2 directory search).
